name: fix-review
description: Verify fix commits address audit findings without new bugs
capabilities: Compare fix commits against original audit findings to verify resolution
Check that fixes address root causes rather than symptoms
Identify potential side effects or new vulnerabilities introduced by fixes
Validate test coverage for fixed scenarios
Detect similar vulnerability patterns elsewhere in the codebase
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All static analysis findings are false positives. The detected URLs are documentation references in markdown, not executable network code. The weak crypto warning on line 3 is incorrect - that line contains only a description string. This skill is documentation-only with no executable code, presenting no security risk.
valueStatement: Security fixes require careful validation to ensure they resolve issues without introducing new bugs. This skill reviews fix commits against audit findings to confirm proper remediation.
userTitle: Verify Fix Commits Address Audit Findings
limitations: Cannot execute or test code changes - analysis is static only
Requires access to both the original audit report and fix commits
May miss context-specific business logic vulnerabilities
Cannot verify runtime behavior or performance impact of fixes

useCases.targetUser: Security team leads managing remediation workflows
useCases.title: Security Team Lead
useCases.description: Review developer commits that claim to fix penetration test findings before merging to main branch

useCases.title: Compliance Officer
useCases.description: Validate that audit findings from external assessors have been properly addressed before compliance sign-off

useCases.title: Development Team
useCases.description: Self-review fix commits before submitting for security team approval to reduce iteration cycles

promptTemplates.title: Basic Fix Verification
promptTemplates.prompt: Review commit {commit_hash} and verify it addresses audit finding {finding_id}. Check that the fix resolves the root cause and does not introduce new issues.
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick verification of a single fix commit

promptTemplates.title: Full Remediation Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze all commits in branch {branch_name} created to address security audit report {report_id}. For each finding, verify the fix is complete, test coverage exists, and no similar vulnerabilities remain in the codebase.
promptTemplates.scenario: Comprehensive review of a remediation branch

promptTemplates.title: Regression Check
promptTemplates.prompt: Compare the code changes in {diff_or_commit} against the original vulnerability description. Identify any potential regressions, side effects, or new attack vectors the fix might introduce.
promptTemplates.scenario: Deep dive into fix quality and side effects

promptTemplates.title: Pattern-Based Review
promptTemplates.prompt: The audit found {vulnerability_type} vulnerabilities at these locations: {locations}. Review commit {commit_hash} and identify if the same pattern exists elsewhere in the codebase that was missed.
promptTemplates.scenario: Finding similar vulnerabilities across the codebase

bestPractices: Always compare fixes against the original audit finding description to ensure complete resolution
Verify that test cases specifically cover the attack scenario that was fixed
Search the codebase for similar patterns that may require the same fix
antiPatterns: Accepting fixes that only address symptoms without fixing root causes
Merging partial fixes that leave similar vulnerabilities in other locations
Skipping regression testing after security fixes are applied

faq.question: What information do I need to provide for a fix review?
faq.answer: Provide the commit hash or branch containing fixes, and reference the original audit finding ID or description. Access to the full audit report improves review accuracy.

faq.question: Can this skill verify that a fix actually works?
faq.answer: This skill performs static analysis to verify fix completeness and correctness. It cannot execute tests but can verify that test coverage was added for the fixed scenario.

faq.question: How do I know if a fix introduces new vulnerabilities?
faq.answer: The review analyzes code changes for common regression patterns, checks for proper input validation, and identifies potential side effects from the fix approach.

faq.question: What if the fix only partially addresses a finding?
faq.answer: The review will flag incomplete fixes and identify which aspects remain unaddressed. Partial fixes should not be merged until all aspects are resolved.

faq.question: Can this skill find similar vulnerabilities elsewhere in the codebase?
faq.answer: Yes, the review includes pattern matching to identify similar vulnerability patterns in other files that may have been missed in the original audit.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for compliance documentation?
faq.answer: Yes, the review produces documented evidence of fix verification that can be included in compliance artifacts and audit trails for regulatory requirements.
